#  Budget Risk 
#### Summary
This page uses a scatterplot with the Projected Over/Under on the X-axis and the 'Revised Budget' on the Y-axis. The size of the bubble indicates the risk count.
#### Sample Report Page
![Budget Risk](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/34bd9049e307877ca2b1d284e9040eac/683f6fd32ab49a1a0fce3702ac56ae72/budget-risk.png?fm=webp)
_This sample report page was created using mock data for demonstration purposes only._
